name: Piedmont Club - Haymarket
about: Piedmont Club is a premier country club located in Haymarket, Virginia, serving the greater Washington D.C. area. The club is centered around a private 18-hole championship golf course designed by Tom Fazio. It operates on a membership-only basis, offering a variety of membership categories including full golf, limited golf, and social memberships. Piedmont Club emphasizes a robust social calendar, dining options, and private event venues for its members. The club is part of the Invited Network, providing members access to over 300 country clubs nationwide.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a Tom Fazio-designed championship golf course
Membership includes Invited Network access to over 300 country clubs
Comprehensive golf coaching and club fitting programs available
Multiple membership categories tailored to different play preferences
Robust social calendar and tournament events

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining access for all membership categories, with gourmet cuisine available for private events
Full bar access included with dining and social amenities

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: For on-course play, you would need your own set of golf clubs. Club fitting services are available to help you find the right equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are provided by the club through its dining services. BYOB policies are not mentioned, and private event catering is available.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for playing 18 holes on the Tom Fazio-designed course.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club is family-friendly, with membership including dependent children under 26 who are full-time college students, and youth golf programs available.
